basic_details.job_title: JNRM Sri Vijaya Puram Guest Faculty / Resource Person Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Jawaharlal Nehru Rajkeeya Mahavidyalaya (JNRM Sri Vijaya Puram) Recruitment 2026: Jawaharlal Nehru Rajkeeya Mahavidyalaya has released the official notification for Guest Faculty / Resource Person posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid education jobs.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: No specific minimum or maximum age limit is mentioned in the official notification for these posts. However, age relaxation provisions are available as follows: | SC/ST/OBC (Non-creamy Layer)/Differently abled: 5% relaxation at Bachelor's and Master's level. Ph.D. Degree holders (Master's Degree prior to 19 September 1991): 5% relaxation (from 55% to 50% of the marks).

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree with 55% marks (or equivalent) and NET/SLET/SET or Ph.D. Degree. Relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/PWD and for those with Master's Degree before 1991.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs.1,500/- per lecture (max Rs.50,000/- per month) for NET/Ph.D. holders; Rs.1,000/- per lecture (max Rs.25,000/- per month) for Post Graduation Degree holders.

selection_process: Preparation of merit list based on Academic Score as specified in Appendix II (Table 3B) of UGC Regulations 2018.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for JNRM Sri Vijaya Puram Guest Faculty / Resource Person Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: jnrm.and.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 13-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.text: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: No specific minimum or maximum age limit is mentioned in the official notification for these posts. However, age relaxation provisions are available as follows: SC/ST/OBC (Non-creamy Layer)/Differently abled: 5% relaxation at Bachelor's and Master's level. Ph.D. Degree holders (Master's Degree prior to 19 September 1991): 5% relaxation (from 55% to 50% of the marks).

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for JNRM Sri Vijaya Puram Guest Faculty / Resource Person Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: jnrm.and.nic.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 13-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: JNRM Sri Vijaya Puram Guest Faculty / Resource Person Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for JNRM Sri Vijaya Puram Guest Faculty / Resource Person Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit applications for the Guest Faculty / Resource Person posts at JNRM Sri Vijaya Puram is 13 July 2026. Candidates must ensure their applications reach the college office by this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the eligibility criteria for Guest Faculty / Resource Person at JNRM?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a Master's degree with 55% marks and have cleared NET/SLET/SET, or possess a Ph.D. degree as per UGC regulations. Specific relaxations apply for certain categories and Ph.D. holders.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for Guest Faculty / Resource Person posts?
faq.answer: There is 1 vacancy available for the Resource Persons / Guest Lecturers post at Jawaharlal Nehru Rajkeeya Mahavidyalaya. This recruitment aims to fill positions for the academic year 2026-2027.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary structure for Guest Faculty / Resource Person?
faq.answer: NET/Ph.D. holders will receive Rs.1,500/- per lecture, with a maximum monthly ceiling of Rs.50,000/-. Post Graduation Degree holders without NET/Ph.D. will get Rs.1,000/- per lecture, up to Rs.25,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for JNRM Guest Faculty Recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the Guest Faculty / Resource Person posts at JNRM Sri Vijaya Puram is offline. Candidates need to download the form, fill it, and submit it along with required documents to the Principal's office.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: No specific minimum or maximum age limit is mentioned in the official notification. However, age relaxation benefits are provided for SC/ST/OBC/Differently abled candidates and Ph.D. degree holders as per norms.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for Guest Faculty / Resource Person at JNRM?
faq.answer: The selection process involves the preparation of a merit list. This list will be based on the academic score of the candidates, as specified in Appendix II (Table 3B) of the UGC Regulations 2018.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of Jawaharlal Nehru Rajkeeya Mahavidyalaya, which is jnrm.and.nic.in. Ensure you download the correct form for the Guest Faculty / Resource Person recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required to be submitted with the application?
faq.answer: Along with the filled application form, candidates must submit a recent passport size photo, self-marking proforma, and self-attested copies of all relevant educational and experience documents. Refer to the notification for a complete list.

faq.question: Q10. When does the application process begin for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for JNRM Sri Vijaya Puram Guest Faculty / Resource Person Recruitment 2026 begins on 04 July 2026. Candidates can start submitting their applications from this date onwards.
